intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再按中文电影线记忆：飞机从 London 到 Sydney -> 工人卸 wooden boxes -> 一个箱子 extremely heavy -> 工人想到 open up the box -> 箱里有人 -> 他承认 hiding in the box -> 被 confined 超过十八小时 -> 最后 $3,500 比 $2,000 更贵。读的时候把 cargo-discovery 的停顿读清楚，最后价格对比要带一点反讽。

sentences.text: When a plane from London arrived at Sydney airport, workers began to unload a number of wooden boxes which contained clothing.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：伦敦来的飞机到了悉尼，工人开始卸装衣服的木箱。When 引导时间背景；unload 和 wooden boxes 要读清楚。

sentences.text: No one could account for the fact that one of the boxes was extremely heavy.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：没人解释得清为什么一个箱子特别重。account for 是解释原因；extremely heavy 要读出“重得不正常”。

sentences.text: It suddenly occurred to one of the workers to open up the box.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：一个工人突然想到打开看看。It occurred to... 是“突然想到”；to open up the box 是真正想到的动作。

sentences.text: A man was lying in the box on top of a pile of woolen goods.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：一个人躺在箱子里的一堆毛织品上。was lying 是正在躺着；on top of a pile of woolen goods 是位置和背景。

sentences.text: He was so surprised at being discovered that he did not even try to run away.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他被发现后太吃惊，连跑都没跑。being discovered 是“被发现”；so...that... 要读出因果关系。

sentences.text: After he was arrested, the man admitted hiding in the box before the plane left London.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：被逮捕后，他承认在飞机离开伦敦前躲进箱子。After 后轻停；admitted hiding 是 admit doing。

sentences.text: He had had a long and uncomfortable trip, for he had been confined to the wooden box for over eighteen hours.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他经历了漫长难受的旅行，因为被困在木箱里超过十八小时。第一个 had 是助动词，第二个 had 是经历；had been confined 是被困住。

sentences.text: The man was ordered to pay $3,500 for the cost of the trip. The normal price of a ticket is $2,000!
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他被要求付 3500 美元，而正常票价才 2000 美元。was ordered to pay 是被要求付钱；两个价格要读成 three thousand five hundred dollars 和 two thousand dollars。
